title: shamad #8045
definition:
1) to destroy, exterminate, be destroyed, be exterminated
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to be annihilated, be exterminated
        1a2) to be destroyed, be devastated
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to annihilate, exterminate
        1b2) to destroy
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to destroy, exterminate, be destroyed, be exterminated
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to be annihilated, be exterminated
        1a2) to be destroyed, be devastated
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to annihilate, exterminate
        1b2) to destroy

    NASB:  to be exterminated or destroyed
